label: Hubble Constant Early Universe (Log-Scaling Evolution)
mathematical_goal: Verify that the G2 evolution engine reproduces Planck H0 at z=1100, AND quantify the circularity of the interpolation method
theoretical_significance: The Hubble tension is a 4-6 sigma discrepancy between early-universe (CMB: 67.4) and late-universe (SH0ES: 73.04) measurements of H0. The PM evolution engine uses a v16.1 Ricci flow interpolation that smoothly transitions between H0_late and H0_early using a scale z*=b3/k_gimel~1.95 derived from b3=24.

circularity_analysis.issue: The v16.1 interpolation uses H0_early=67.4 as a direct input endpoint. At z=1100, the weight on H0_early is 99.9997%, so the near-zero tension is structural, not predictive.

raw_v14_2_cross_check.note: The raw formula (which does NOT use H0_early as input) gives 101.4 km/s/Mpc, a 68-sigma deviation from Planck. The log-scaling mechanism alone does not reproduce early H0.

interpolation_diagnostic.conclusion: The interpolation at z=1100 is effectively returning the H0_early input. Near-zero tension is by construction.

circularity_analysis.non_trivial_content: b3=24 determines the transition redshift z*~1.95 via z* = b3/k_gimel. This is the genuinely derived quantity - the transition scale between early and late regimes is set by topology, not fitted.

evolution_mechanism.provenance: Merged v14.2 log-scaling + v16.1 Ricci flow

derivation_chain: z_star = b3/k_gimel ~ 1.95 (transition redshift from Ricci flow timescale)
At z=1100: f~3e-6, so H0_eff ~ H0_early = 67.4 by construction
Cross-check: raw log-scaling gives H0 ~ 101.4 (68sigma from Planck)

honesty_notes.H0_late_is_input: 73.04 km/s/Mpc is an ESTABLISHED experimental value (SH0ES 2025), not derived
honesty_notes.H0_early_is_input: 67.4 km/s/Mpc is an ESTABLISHED experimental value (Planck 2018), fed directly into the interpolation as an endpoint
honesty_notes.interpolation_is_tautological: At z=1100, the interpolation weight on H0_early is 99.9997%. The near-zero tension (0.00004 sigma) is by construction, not a physics prediction. The raw v14.2 formula (no H0_early input) gives 101.4 km/s/Mpc (68 sigma).
honesty_notes.non_trivial_content: b3=24 sets the transition scale z*~1.95 from topology. This is the genuinely derived prediction. Future observations at z~1-3 could test this transition.
honesty_notes.EDE_mechanism_refuted: The previous certificate tested EDE with boost factor 95; this was refuted (see hubble_tension.py header).
honesty_notes.version_history: v1: tautological (hardcoded 67.4 vs 67.4). v2: uses evolution engine output. v3 (current): adds circularity diagnostic with raw formula cross-check.

observational_tests.transition_scale: z_star ~ 1.95 is the key testable prediction: H(z) should show transition behavior at z~2, testable with DESI full survey BAO at z=1.5-2.5
observational_tests.CMB_S4: Precision H0 from CMB-S4 will constrain early H0 to better than 0.5 km/s/Mpc
observational_tests.gravitational_waves: Standard sirens at multiple redshifts provide H(z) measurements independent of CMB and distance ladder

assessment.raw_H0_prediction: 101.4 km/s/Mpc (from pure log-scaling, 68 sigma from Planck)
assessment.genuinely_predicted: Transition scale z* ~ 1.95 from b3=24 topology
assessment.overall_assessment: Gate validates evolution engine pipeline but agreement is by construction. The genuine physics content is the transition redshift z*~1.95 set by b3.
